hypothesis: Augmenting CompGen’s conditioning inputs with explicit active-site motif labels (e.g., atop/bridge/hollow) and the adsorbate-to-first-shell average distance will increase the fraction of generated two-shell compositions whose DFT-relaxed adsorption energies lie within ±0.10 eV of the target adsorption energy by at least 20% relative to the current CompGen conditioned only on adsorbate identity, adsorption energy, and element list.
